commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 3-second timeout to the temporary gateway bind probe in `src/gateway/net.ts` so a never-settling `::1` probe resolves false and startup can continue with IPv4-only listeners.

PR surface: Source +32. Total +32 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: unclear. for live reproduction: current source confirms startup awaits an unbounded `canBindToHost("::1")` probe, but this review did not reproduce the macOS Big Sur no-event behavior itself.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a branch refresh; ClawSweeper should not repair or merge it without that proof gate being satisfied.

target.title: fix(net): add 3s timeout to canBindToHost to prevent Big Sur startup hang
target.author: leegisang
